verdict.answer_first: B leads with outcome: "The bug: this mutates shared state in place"; A buries it after meta: "flagged routing rule... I'll just review it directly".
verdict.decisiveness: A is more decisive: "Fix — make it pure" and "Prefer the immutable version"; B weakens with "pick based on which model".
verdict.fabrication: A invents/process-leaks "flagged routing rule" not in the question; otherwise examples are framed as examples. B: none material.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on because it gives the failing check "next === state; // true" then the exact replacement.
